creator: kasahara@nc.kyushu-u.ac.jp
text:
portversion reports wrong results when comparing ports.

example (somewhat old INDEX file was used):
ja-vfghostscript-5.50a_2    >  succeeds port (port has 5.50a_3)
librep-0.15.1               >  succeeds port (port has 0.15.2)
portupgrade-20011103        <  needs updating (port has 20011102.2)

How-To-Repeat: 
Simply run portversion.
